rag_rules: Use assume and guarantee statements in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees inside annex agree only when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are provided
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {**... **}; blocks
Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
